library.name: lucide-react
reasons: Consistent stroke-based system for product UI.
Wide coverage for navigation, status, and actions.
Works cleanly with shadcn/ui component defaults.

defaults.alignment: Icons should align to text baselines through flex containers with gap utilities.

sizeScale.name: xs
sizeScale.usage: Dense icon buttons, tight badges, and micro-controls.

sizeScale.name: sm
sizeScale.usage: Default UI icon size for buttons, nav items, rows, and cards.

sizeScale.name: md
sizeScale.usage: Brand marks, larger headers, and empty-state support icons.

sizeScale.name: lg
sizeScale.usage: Feature callouts and expressive section anchors.

rules: Use Lucide icons before drawing custom SVGs for standard product actions.
Keep most interactive UI icons at 16px.
Pair icons with 8px gap in buttons and nav rows.
Use muted foreground by default for secondary icons and foreground color for primary actions.
Avoid mixing filled icon packs with Lucide in the same surface unless the brand system explicitly allows it.
